rulings.Case Title: RANDY TREAS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 9, 2018 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Sequoia Ventures, Inc.'s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is off calendar as moot pursuant to the January 4, 2018 dismissal of the action. = (503/CML)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA PONCHIONE VS. CONSOLIDATED INSULATION, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Tax Defendant Oreilly Auto Enterprises, Llc (Fka Csk Auto, Inc.S Memorandum Of Costs
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 9, 2018 in Department 503, Line 2. Plaintiffs' motion to tax defendant O'Reilly Auto Enterprises, LLC (fka CSK Auto, Inc.)'s memorandum of costs is continued to January 24, 2018 pursuant to Local Rule 2.7(B). No later than January 11, 2018, defendant must lodge with the Court courtesy copies of its opposition as well as the entirety of its cost memorandum. If a hearing is requested to contest this continuance, it will be at 9:30a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. = (503/CML)
